posts.author: Vaibhav.S.G (Vaibhav Ghaste)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have doubts about the Gantt chart; when we select 2 date columns can we differentiate these 2 date columns?

image1099×364 50.5 KB

In the above picture, I have selected the Planned date and Live date so, it shows 2 dates but it does not look perfect because we can’t differentiate both dates. And in this Gantt chart, we are showing the critical path.

Is there any way to differentiate the Planned date and the Live date?

posts.author: kaylak (Kayla K)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Vaibhav.S.G ,

Have you experimented with the baseline snapshot feature on Monday?
I’m not sure if this can accomplish what you are looking to do, but here is the documentation so you can read about it and determine if this may help.
